basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhopal Project Technical Support Staff III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Bhopal
basic_details.short_information: AIIMS Bhopal is recruiting 1 Project Technical Support Staff-III post under ICMR project.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | desirable: Publications, Hands-on experience in molecular biology techniques (Cell culture, cloning, RT-PCR, Western Blotting, Protein assays), MS Office, Bioinformatics, Statistics | age limit: Below 30 years (relaxation for SC/ST as per rules) | application fee: Nil
qualification.education_qualification: Three Years Graduate degree in Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Life Sciences/Health Sciences + three years post qualification experience OR Post Graduate in Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Life Sciences/Health Sciences or related subjects

vacancy_details.details: Name of the Post: Project Technical Support Staff-III No. of Vacancy: 01

selection_process: Shortlisting based on applications received. Written Test and/or Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the exact date
and venue. Candidates must bring all original documents at the time of test/interview.
how_to_apply: Interested candidates must send a scanned copy of the duly filled application form along with all supporting documents to [email protected] latest by 13 July 2026.
Application form can be downloaded from: http://aiimsbhopal.edu.in/jobs.aspx
Do not send hard copy of the application form.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and project-based. No claim for regular/permanent absorption. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the test/interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. All updates will be available on the AIIMS Bhopal official website.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Project Technical Support Staff Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Bhopal has invited applications for the post of Project Technical Support Staff-III in an ICMR-funded research project (CODE-ICRC).Project Title: Genotype-phenotype correlation in hereditary cancer patients with germline variants in cancer predisposing DNA repair genes through multifunctional interrogation of patients derived lymphoblastoid cell lines and underlying alternative splicing events: a personalized medicine approach. Principal Investigator: Dr. Ashwin Kotnis, Professor, Department of Biochemistry, AIIMS Bhopal Download AIIMS Bhopal Project Technical Support Staff Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Project Technical Support Staff Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: AIIMS Bhopal is recruiting 1 Project Technical Support Staff-III post under ICMR project.

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Name of the Post: Project Technical Support Staff-III No. of Vacancy: 01

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Project Technical Support Staff Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Three Years Graduate degree in Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Life Sciences/Health Sciences + three years post qualification experience OR Post Graduate in Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Life Sciences/Health Sciences or related subjects
Publications, Hands-on experience in molecular biology techniques (Cell culture, cloning, RT-PCR, Western Blotting, Protein assays), MS Office, Bioinformatics, Statistics
Below 30 years (relaxation for SC/ST as per rules)

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on applications received. Written Test and/or Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the exact date, time, and venue. Candidates must bring all original documents at the time of test/interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AIIMS Bhopal Project Technical Support Staff Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates must send a scanned copy of the duly filled application form along with all supporting documents to [email protected] latest by 13 July 2026. Application form can be downloaded from: http://aiimsbhopal.edu.in/jobs.aspx Do not send hard copy of the application form.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary and project-based. No claim for regular/permanent absorption. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the test/interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. All updates will be available on the AIIMS Bhopal official website.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Bhopal Project Technical Support Staff 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send the application is 13 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for Project Technical Support Staff-III at AIIMS Bhopal?
faq.answer: Graduate degree + 3 years experience OR Post Graduate degree in Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Life Sciences or related fields.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for AIIMS Bhopal ICMR Project Technical Staff post?
faq.answer: Consolidated remuneration is Rs. 33,600/- per month (Rs. 28,000 + 20% HRA).

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for Project Technical Support Staff-III.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for AIIMS Bhopal Project Technical Support Staff?
faq.answer: Maximum age is below 30 years (relaxation for SC/ST candidates).

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for AIIMS Bhopal Project Technical Support Staff position?
faq.answer: Send scanned copy of filled application form + documents to [email protected] before the deadline. Do not send hard copy.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent job at AIIMS Bhopal?
faq.answer: No. It is a purely temporary contractual position under ICMR project.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project title for this AIIMS Bhopal ICMR vacancy?
faq.answer: Genotype-phenotype correlation in hereditary cancer patients with germline variants in DNA repair genes.

faq.question: Q9. Will there be a written test for AIIMS Bhopal Technical Support Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, Written Test and/or Interview will be conducted. Date will be intimated to shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Who is the Principal Investigator for this ICMR project at AIIMS Bhopal?
faq.answer: Dr. Ashwin Kotnis, Professor, Department of Biochemistry, AIIMS Bhopal.
